violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand sink to be added in back prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Wiener sauce was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand sink to be added in back prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink was drained and redone. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Meat sauce was placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic covered containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap sheet provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2025
The condensate from the air conditioner unit is draining into the walk-in. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2025
The floor in the back prep area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
